steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “one of ______ Pride and Prejudice” requires the blank to contain a possessive form + plural noun, because “one of” means you're selecting a single item from a group of multiple items.

steps.title: Match the answer to the clue
steps.content: ”Austen's most famous novels” correctly pairs possessive singular “Austen's” with plural “novels,” expressing that Pride and Prejudice is one among Austen's works. The other choices either misuse the possessive, omit it, or singularize the noun. That matches choice A — A is correct.
